info.name: Stables-HT-HOL-ONLY-time-daily-1-fix3
info.description:
HOL-ONLY fix3: EPOCH-BY-EPOCH BIDIRECTIONAL FLOW (Pattern #2)
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

KEY UPGRADE from fix2:
  fix2: Single ACTUS call, PP events drain USDC but cash never changes
  fix3: 31 epoch-by-epoch ACTUS calls with JavaScript portfolio tracking
        Cash INCREASES when models trigger redemptions (PP payoffs mirrored)
        Cash DECREASES when holder deposits back to USDC (when risk subsides)

CONFIGURABLE PARAMETERS (edit in Collection Variables):
  cfg_initial_cash:       Starting cash balance (default: $150,000)
  cfg_first_deposit:      Initial cash→stablecoin deposit (default: $75,000)
  cfg_stablecoin:         Which stablecoin (default: USDC)
  cfg_deterioration_pct:  % deterioration that triggers redeem (default: 1%)
  cfg_redeem_pct:         % of USDC to redeem per trigger (default: 20%)
  cfg_deposit_pct:        % of cash to deposit when safe (default: 15%)
  cfg_peg_dev_trigger:    Peg deviation trigger level (default: 0.01 = 1%)
  cfg_reserves_floor:     Min reserves before redeeming (default: $100,000)
  cfg_liquidity_floor:    Min liquidity ratio (default: 0.25 = 25%)
  cfg_peg_risk_trigger:   Peg risk score trigger (default: 15)
  cfg_peg_dev_safe:       Peg deviation safe level for deposits (default: 0.003)
  cfg_reserves_safe:      Reserves safe level for deposits (default: $101,000)
  cfg_liquidity_safe:     Liquidity safe level for deposits (default: 0.28)
  cfg_peg_risk_safe:      Peg risk safe level for deposits (default: 10)

PATTERN: iter5-style JavaScript epoch loop (Pattern #2)
  Phase 5 request loops 31 times via postman.setNextRequest()
  Each epoch: build contract with current USDC notional → call ACTUS →
    mirror PP payoffs to cash → check risk → deposit back when safe

ZERO CODE CHANGES. Same 4 Java model classes. Collection JSON only.
Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C) before running with Collection Runner.

exec: // Reads config → checks risk → runs ACTUS for 1 day → mirrors PP to cash → deposits when safe
// ─── INDEX DATA (31 daily values, same scenario) ───
var pad = function(n) { return n < 10 ? '0' + n : '' + n; };
console.log('HOL-ONLY fix3: EPOCH-BY-EPOCH WITH BIDIRECTIONAL CASH \u2194 ' + CFG.stablecoin);
console.log('  Redeem chunk: ' + (CFG.redeemPct * 100) + '% of ' + CFG.stablecoin + ' when risky');
console.log('  Deposit chunk: ' + (CFG.depositPct * 100) + '% of cash when safe');
console.log('  Thresholds: pegDev>' + CFG.pegDevTrigger + ' reserves<$' + CFG.reservesFloor + ' liq<' + (CFG.liqFloor*100) + '% pegRisk>' + CFG.pegRiskTrigger);
console.log('DEPOSIT: $' + CFG.firstDeposit + ' cash \u2192 ' + CFG.stablecoin + '  |  Cash=$' + cash + ' ' + CFG.stablecoin + '=$' + usdc);
// Risky: any metric beyond trigger (deteriorated > cfg_deterioration_pct from safe)
// Safe: all metrics within safe band
// ─── HOLDER DECISION: DEPOSIT BACK WHEN SAFE ───
day: dayNum, cash: Math.round(cash), usdc: Math.round(usdc), total: total,
pp: Math.round(ppPayoff), action: holderAction, amt: Math.round(holderAmt),
pegDev: m.pegDev, pegRisk: m.pegRisk, reserves: m.reserves,
liq: Math.round(liq * 1000) / 10, risky: isRisky, safe: isSafe
'  [peg=' + (m.pegDev*100).toFixed(1) + '% risk=' + m.pegRisk + ' res=$' + m.reserves + ' liq=' + snap.liq + '%]');
if (err) { console.log('[Epoch ' + dayNum + '] ERROR: ' + err); finalize(0); return; }
console.log('All 31 epochs complete. Moving to summary.');
// Reset epoch counter for potential re-run
// (don't reset here — let the test script display first)
console.log('Day  Cash        ' + CFG_SC + '        Total       Action      Risk');
var maxCash = 0, minUsdc = 999999999, maxPP = 0, deposits = 0, redeems = 0;
var risk = s.risky ? '\u26A0\uFE0F RISKY' : (s.safe ? '\u2705 SAFE' : '\u2796 HOLD');
console.log(String(s.day).padStart(3) + '  ' + cashStr + usdcStr + totalStr + actStr + risk);
console.log('FINAL: Cash=$' + last.cash + ' ' + CFG_SC + '=$' + last.usdc + ' Total=$' + last.total);
console.log('  Portfolio preservation: ' + ((last.total / CFG_INIT) * 100).toFixed(1) + '% of initial $' + CFG_INIT);
console.log('  Peak daily PP (model-driven redeem): $' + maxPP);
console.log('  Days with model redemptions: ' + redeems + '/31');
console.log('  Days with holder deposits: ' + deposits + '/31');
pm.expect(deposits).to.be.above(0, 'Expected at least one deposit-back event');
